sent_simp: 新员工容易抱团，不愿融入大集体。
sent_trad: 新員工容易抱團，不願融入大集體。
pinyin: Xīn yuángōng róngyì bào tuán, bù yuàn róngrù dà jítǐ.
english: New employees tend to band together and are reluctant to integrate into the larger group.

sent_simp: 这台超级计算机每秒能完成亿次运算。
sent_trad: 這台超級計算機每秒能完成億次運算。
pinyin: Zhè tái chāojí jìsuànjī měi miǎo néng wánchéng yì cì yùnsuàn.
english: This supercomputer can perform one hundred million calculations per second.
